metadata.purpose: Drag race logical switch reference library
metadata.source: Gemini research + Grok pattern generation + EdgeTX documentation
critical_constraints: GV cannot be used for mix slow-up/slow-down ramp time — those fields are hardcoded numeric only (0.0-25.0s). Lua is the only workaround.
andsw is a hard gate — sticky switch drops immediately if andsw goes false, not just a filter
FUNC_EQUAL is unreliable for analog sensors due to jitter — do not use on telemetry

FUNC_STICKY.description: Latching relay. Turns ON when set input fires and holds ON until clear input fires. Does not require continuous input to stay active.

parameters.V1: Set input — fires the latch ON

FUNC_STICKY.delay_behavior: How long set condition must be true before latch fires
FUNC_STICKY.duration_behavior: If set, latch automatically clears itself after this many seconds — enables self-advancing sequences via FUNC_EDGE on the drop-off
FUNC_STICKY.andsw_behavior: Hard safety gate. Sticky cannot turn ON unless andsw is active. If sticky is already ON and andsw goes false, sticky drops immediately.
FUNC_STICKY.drag_use_case: Master Run Active switch triggered by trans brake release. Stage timers. Any state that must persist after a momentary input.

FUNC_VPOS.description: True when variable (a) is strictly greater than fixed threshold (x).

parameters.a: Variable source — stick, knob, telemetry sensor

FUNC_VPOS.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_VPOS.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating, regardless of input
FUNC_VPOS.drag_use_case: Detect throttle stick past 10% for staging detection. Detect GPS speed above threshold for steering limiter. Primary tool for telemetry comparisons.

FUNC_VNEG.description: True when variable (a) is less than fixed threshold (x).
FUNC_VNEG.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_VNEG.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_VNEG.drag_use_case: Low battery alarm when pack voltage drops below safe limit. Detect throttle below staging threshold.

FUNC_APOS.description: True when absolute value of variable (a) is greater than threshold (x). Ignores sign — works identically in forward and reverse.
FUNC_APOS.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_APOS.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_APOS.drag_use_case: Measure throttle deflection from center regardless of reverse range.

FUNC_ANEG.description: True when absolute value of variable (a) is less than threshold (x). Ignores sign.
FUNC_ANEG.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_ANEG.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_ANEG.drag_use_case: Detect stick near center regardless of direction.

FUNC_AND.description: True only when both V1 and V2 are simultaneously true.
FUNC_AND.delay_behavior: How long both conditions must be simultaneously true before switch activates
FUNC_AND.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_AND.drag_use_case: Safety interlock: allow launch only if arming switch is ON AND throttle is above staging threshold. Gate stage transitions.

FUNC_OR.description: True when either V1 or V2 is true.
FUNC_OR.delay_behavior: How long either condition must be true before switch activates
FUNC_OR.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_OR.drag_use_case: Trigger alert from multiple sources — overheat OR low voltage.

FUNC_XOR.description: True when V1 and V2 are in opposite states.
FUNC_XOR.delay_behavior: How long XOR condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_XOR.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_XOR.drag_use_case: Detect state mismatch between two inputs. Rarely needed in drag racing.

FUNC_EDGE.description: True for a brief moment when an input transitions. Detects the falling or rising edge of a signal. Takes minimum hold time (T1) and maximum hold time (T2) — fires only if input was held between T1 and T2 seconds.

parameters.input: Switch or logical switch to monitor
parameters.T1: Minimum hold time before edge fires
parameters.T2: Maximum hold time — set to -- for no limit

FUNC_EDGE.duration_behavior: Controls pulse width of the edge output
FUNC_EDGE.drag_use_case: Detect drop-off of a STICKY switch with Duration set — this is the domino mechanism for self-advancing stage sequences. Detect deliberate 2-second hold for reset vs accidental press.
FUNC_EDGE.critical_note: FUNC_EDGE on a STICKY drop-off is how Stage 1 dying automatically triggers Stage 2 — the falling edge of L1 becomes the set input for L2.

FUNC_TIMER.description: Pulses ON and OFF continuously while active. Takes ON time (V1) and OFF time (V2).
FUNC_TIMER.delay_behavior: How long activation condition must be met before timer starts
FUNC_TIMER.duration_behavior: Overrides the timer — switch turns off after duration regardless
FUNC_TIMER.drag_use_case: Flash staging light LED while waiting at the line. Burnout timer pulse.

FUNC_EQUAL.description: True when a value exactly equals a target.
FUNC_EQUAL.delay_behavior: How long equality must hold before switch activates
FUNC_EQUAL.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_EQUAL.drag_use_case: Rarely useful — avoid for analog sensors due to jitter. Only reliable for switch positions or integer values.

FUNC_GREATER.description: Compares two live sources against each other. True when source A is greater than source B.

parameters.a: First live source — stick, GV, telemetry
parameters.b: Second live source — stick, GV, telemetry, or knob

FUNC_GREATER.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_GREATER.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_GREATER.drag_use_case: Compare live GPS speed against dialed-in target speed from a knob. Dynamic threshold comparisons.

FUNC_LESS.description: True when source A is less than source B.
FUNC_LESS.delay_behavior: How long condition must be met before switch activates
FUNC_LESS.duration_behavior: How long switch stays ON after activating
FUNC_LESS.drag_use_case: Detect speed dropping below threshold. Battery below knob-set minimum.

three_stage_launch_ramp.description: Self-advancing three-stage throttle sequence triggered by trans brake release. No driver input required after release. Uses STICKY Duration as self-destruct timer and FUNC_EDGE on drop-off as domino trigger.
three_stage_launch_ramp.mechanism: L1 is master Run Active latch. L2 and L3 are stage timers using AND + Delay. Mix layer uses !L2 and !L3 as Replace gates with stage power values. L3 active = full driver control.

switches.V1: ROLE_TRANS_BRAKE release (edge of SC going low)
switches.notes: Master run latch. Fires when trans brake releases. andsw ensures it can only arm in Race mode. Stays ON until reset.

switches.delay: GV4 (Stage 1 duration — set by S2 in Race mode)
switches.notes: Stage 2 trigger. Delay = Stage 1 total time. Goes true when L1 has been active for Stage 1 duration. Replaces Stage 1 mix with Stage 2 mix.
Stage 3 trigger. Delay = Stage 1 + Stage 2 combined time. Goes true when both stages are complete. Hands full control to driver.
switches.verify_note: Confirm EdgeTX supports GV reference in Delay field. If not, fixed values required and Lua needed for adjustable timing.

mix_layer.weight: GV3 (Stage 1 power — set by S1 in Race mode)
mix_layer.speedUp: GV4 (ramp time — if GV in speed field is supported, else fixed)
mix_layer.notes: Stage 1 — active from launch until Stage 2 triggers. Ramps to Stage 1 power level.

mix_layer.weight: GV5 (Stage 2 power — set by S1 cycling to Stage 2)
mix_layer.notes: Stage 2 — active after Stage 1 completes until Stage 3 triggers.
Stage 3 — full driver throttle control. All caps removed.

three_stage_launch_ramp.constraint: Mix speedUp/speedDown fields do not accept GV references in current EdgeTX. Ramp times must be fixed values OR controlled via Lua script reading a GV.

safety_throttle_arm.description: Requires holding trans brake button AND throttle above threshold before anything arms. Prevents accidental full power. Good for bracket racing where driver controls launch but needs a gated arm.

switches.notes: True when throttle is above 5%. Use 10 for extra safety margin.
Only latches if throttle is already above threshold (L1). Extra safety layer — can't arm from a dead stick.

mix_layer.notes: Full throttle curve only active when L2 is latched. Use L2 as enabler for GV writes too.

safety_throttle_arm.use_case: Bracket racing. Simple gate — no timers, full driver control, just prevents accidental arm.

two_stage_timed_ramp.description: Launch button fires master latch. Stage 1 holds low power for 1.5s (wheel spin control), then Stage 2 ramps to 70-80% for 2s, then full blast. GV1 makes Stage 1 power adjustable via knob.

switches.notes: Master run active latch. Fires on trans brake release.
Stage 1 hold window. Active from 1.5s to 3.5s after launch. Duration = 2.0s window. Write pot to GV1 while L2 is active to make Stage 1 power adjustable.
Full power trigger. Active after Stage 1 window ends. Delay = Stage 1 + Stage 2 combined time.
switches.verify_note: Confirm OR with delay behaves as expected — delay applies to condition being true, not individual inputs.

mix_layer.weight: GV1 (Stage 1 power — set by S1 knob while L2 active)
mix_layer.notes: Low power stage. GV1 written by pot for real-time adjustment.
Full send. Active after both stages complete.

two_stage_timed_ramp.use_case: General drag racing. Two-stage with adjustable Stage 1 power via knob. No Lua required for power adjustment — only ramp time needs Lua if adjustability wanted.

throttle_triggered_auto_sequence.description: Hold launch button AND pull full throttle to commit. Auto timed rollout fires — no further input needed. Common slam-and-go setup. Button arms intent, full stick commits.

switches.notes: True when throttle is at or above 95% — detects full stick pull.
Requires both button AND full throttle simultaneously. Prevents accidental trigger.
Master run latch. Fires once L2 condition is met. Holds for duration of run.
OPTIONAL — staged power blips if wanted. Cosmetic/experimental. Not required for basic sequence.

throttle_triggered_auto_sequence.mix_layer: Chain delays off L3 same as two_stage_timed_ramp pattern.
throttle_triggered_auto_sequence.use_case: Slam-and-go drag cars. More committed trigger than trans brake hold — requires full stick intent.

max_runtime_limiter.description: Hard safety timeout. Full power cuts after X seconds regardless of driver input. Prevents overheating and meltdown on long or runaway runs.

switches.notes: Master run latch — same as other patterns.
True for exactly 12 seconds after launch then self-clears. Adjust duration for your safe max run time.

mix_layer.notes: Inverted — when L5 expires (!L5 goes true), throttle is forced to zero. Hard cut.

max_runtime_limiter.use_case: Any drag setup. Stack on top of any other pattern as a safety layer. Combine with battery voltage telemetry LS for double protection.
max_runtime_limiter.stack_note: This pattern is designed to be combined with others, not used alone.

trans_brake_hold.description: Locks throttle output to zero while ROLE_TRANS_BRAKE is held. Releases on button drop.

switches.V2: ROLE_TRANS_BRAKE (SC released) OR L1 (run latch fires)
switches.notes: Active while SC held. Cleared on release (which also fires run latch L1).

mix_layer.notes: Zero throttle override while trans brake is held.

knob_to_gv_write.description: Analog knob continuously writes its value to a Global Variable via Special Functions.
knob_to_gv_write.drag_use_case: S1 sets Stage 1 power level (GV3). S2 sets Stage 1 ramp time (GV4). SB cycles which stage S1/S2 currently affect by enabling different SF entries.
knob_to_gv_write.limitations: GV is updated continuously in real time while the SF is active.

gv_as_mix_weight.description: GV used directly as the Weight value in a mix instead of a fixed number.

edgetx_fields.method: Change source type from fixed number to GV reference

gv_as_mix_weight.drag_use_case: Stage 1 power = GV3 (set by S1 knob). Stage 2 power = GV5. Allows real-time adjustment without editing model.
gv_as_mix_weight.limitations: None known — GV as mix weight is fully supported.

gv_as_speed_param.description: Attempted use of GV for mix slow-up / slow-down ramp time.
gv_as_speed_param.drag_use_case: Adjustable throttle ramp time per stage.
gv_as_speed_param.limitations: NOT SUPPORTED. Slow up/down fields are hardcoded numeric only (0.0 to 25.0 seconds). GV references are not accepted in these fields.
gv_as_speed_param.workaround: Write a Lua script that reads the GV value and pushes it into the mix parameter programmatically. This is the only path to adjustable ramp times.
gv_as_speed_param.verify_note: Confirm this limitation still applies in EdgeTX 2.11.x — may have changed in recent firmware.

gps_speed.example_condition: FUNC_VPOS: GSpd > 30 (speed above 30 units) triggers steering limiter
gps_speed.drag_use_case: Speed-based steering endpoint reduction. Launch detection. 60-foot split logging.
gps_speed.notes: Field name populates based on receiver. GSpd is the default GPS speed field name.

motor_rpm.example_condition: FUNC_VNEG: RPM < 1000 while throttle is high — indicates wheelspin stall
motor_rpm.drag_use_case: Traction control detection. Rev limiter confirmation. Launch RPM hold simulation.
motor_rpm.notes: Requires RPM sensor or ESC telemetry that reports RPM.

esc_temp.example_condition: FUNC_VPOS: EscT > 80 triggers thermal protection — reduces throttle cap via GV
esc_temp.drag_use_case: Thermal protection. Automatic throttle reduction before ESC cutoff. LED color warning.
esc_temp.notes: Field name varies by ESC telemetry protocol. EscT is common default.

battery_voltage.example_condition: FUNC_VNEG: VFAS < 14.2 triggers low voltage warning and reduces max throttle
battery_voltage.drag_use_case: Low battery alarm. Progressive throttle reduction to protect pack. Run cutoff at critical voltage.
battery_voltage.notes: RxBt = receiver battery. VFAS = flight pack voltage via sensor. Cels = cell voltage via FLVSS sensor. Use VFAS or Cels for main drive pack monitoring.
battery_voltage.verify_note: Confirm correct field name for main drive pack on MT12 + typical RC ESC telemetry combo.

telemetry_sources.general_note: Binary logical functions (AND, OR, XOR, STICKY) cannot be applied directly to raw telemetry feeds. Telemetry values must first pass through FUNC_VPOS, FUNC_VNEG, FUNC_GREATER, or FUNC_LESS to produce a boolean output, which can then be combined with binary functions.
